001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.texture;
002
003import java.util.Collections;
004import java.util.HashMap;
005import java.util.Map;
006import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Key;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
008import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
009
010/**
011 * A texture manager that manages textures to store textures that need to be managed.
012 * <p>
013 * Textures added here will be preloaded into memory for later use.
014 */
015public class TextureManager {
016    private final Map<Key, Texture> textures = new HashMap<>();
017
018    /**
019     * Create a new texture manager.
020     */
021    public TextureManager() {
022        // Empty constructor to pacify javadoc lint
023    }
024
025    /**
026     * Add a texture.
027     * <p>
028     * If the texture is from the internet, it will be preloaded into memory on the next render thread tick.
029     *
030     * @param texture Texture to add
031     */
032    public void add(@NotNull Texture texture) {
033        this.textures.put(texture.getKey(), texture);
034    }
035
036    /**
037     * Get a texture by string.
038     *
039     * @param key Unique identifier for texture
040     * @return A texture with specified string if it exists, otherwise {@code null}
041     */
042    @Nullable
043    public Texture get(@NotNull String key) {
044        return get(Key.of(key));
045    }
046
047    /**
048     * Get a texture by key.
049     *
050     * @param key Unique identifier of texture
051     * @return A texture with specified key if it exists, otherwise {@code null}
052     */
053    @Nullable
054    public Texture get(@NotNull Key key) {
055        return this.textures.get(key);
056    }
057
058    /**
059     * Remove a texture by string.
060     *
061     * @param key Unique identifier of texture to remove
062     */
063    public void remove(@NotNull String key) {
064        remove(Key.of(key));
065    }
066
067    /**
068     * Remove a texture by key.
069     *
070     * @param key Unique identifier of texture to remove
071     */
072    public void remove(@NotNull Key key) {
073        this.textures.remove(key);
074    }
075
076    /**
077     * Get an <a href="Collection.html#unmodview">unmodifiable view</a> of the stored textures map.
078     *
079     * @return An unmodifiable view of stored textures map
080     */
081    @NotNull
082    public Map<Key, Texture> getTextures() {
083        return Collections.unmodifiableMap(this.textures);
084    }
085}
